channel.title: Powerline Electromagnetic Radiation for IoT Functions on NTU IoT Group Website
channel.description: Recent content in Powerline Electromagnetic Radiation for IoT Functions on NTU IoT Group Website

item.title: Time
item.description: Sub topic: Time Wearables Clock Synchronization Using Skin Electric Potentials. Application-Layer Clock Synchronization for Wearables Using Skin Electric Potentials Induced by Powerline Radiation. Exploiting Electrical Grid for Accurate and Secure Clock Synchronization. Natural Timestamping Using Powerline Electromagnetic Radiation. Exploiting Power Grid for Accurate and Secure Clock Synchronization in Industrial IoT. Sub topic: Location Towards Touch-to-Access Device Authentication Using Induced Body Electric Potentials. Simultaneous Localization and Mapping with Power Network Electromagnetic Field.

item.title: Location
item.description: Sub topic: Time Wearables Clock Synchronization Using Skin Electric Potentials. Application-Layer Clock Synchronization for Wearables Using Skin Electric Potentials Induced by Powerline Radiation. Exploiting Electrical Grid for Accurate and Secure Clock Synchronization. Natural Timestamping Using Powerline Electromagnetic Radiation. Exploiting Power Grid for Accurate and Secure Clock Synchronization in Industrial IoT. Sub topic: Location Towards Touch-to-Access Device Authentication Using Induced Body Electric Potentials. Simultaneous Localization and Mapping with Power Network Electromagnetic Field.
